title: Modern Backless Bench from Three 2x6 Boards
summary: A minimal backless bench built from only three 2x6 boards — a seat and two simple butt-jointed leg pairs, distinct from this catalog's five-board low-back bench.
description:
This bench strips the material list down even further than this catalog's five-board bench: three 2x6 boards, one seat and two leg pairs, no back, no angled cuts. The whole build is straight butt joints and screws, which makes it a genuinely fast weekend build and a good project for practicing clean, consistent screw placement rather than any joinery technique.

**Stain the boards before assembly**, not after — this is a specific, worthwhile tip for a design this plain: a backless slat-free bench like this has very few surfaces, and pre-finishing each board means no unfinished edges show at the joints once it's built. Touch up the cut ends after assembly rather than trying to finish the whole thing in place.

Cut the longer seat pieces first, then the leg pieces, so any measuring drift shows up on the shorter, less visible parts rather than the seat itself. Screw the leg pairs together, then attach the seat across the top, checking that both leg assemblies are identical before final assembly — a mismatched pair is the one mistake that will make a design this minimal look crooked.

steps.title: Pre-finish the boards
steps.body: Apply exterior wood stain to all boards before cutting and assembly. Touch up the cut ends after the bench is built.

steps.title: Cut the parts
steps.body: Cut the three seat boards to length first, then the leg uprights and feet.

steps.title: Build the leg pairs
steps.body: Screw each leg upright to its foot piece with 2-3/4" screws, forming two leg assemblies. Confirm both are identical before continuing.

steps.title: Attach the seat
steps.body: Screw the three seat boards to the top of the two leg assemblies with 2-3/4" screws, keeping everything square.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand lightly and touch up the cut ends with the exterior stain.

unresolvedImages.alt: Minimal backless bench built from three 2x6 boards
